title: Copywriter

rationales.taskAutomation: Product descriptions, subject lines, ad variants, and landing-page copy from a brief are high-volume, formulaic outputs AI now produces reliably at scale.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI writing tools are mature, commodity products embedded directly in ad platforms, CMSs, and ecommerce catalogs.
rationales.adoption: Most marketing and ecommerce teams already generate first-pass copy with AI as standard practice.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can generate and A/B-test copy variants across a catalog unsupervised, but brand-defining and high-stakes launch copy still needs a human author.

tasksAtRisk: Email subject lines and preview text
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 27-3043 Writers and Authors, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Catalog and variant copy is now an agent job, run and A/B-tested at volumes no human team could match. Copywriters who survive own the brand voice an agent works from and the high-stakes launch copy nobody trusts it to write alone.
